title: Nocturne Musical
company: composer and lyricist Hedda Rustad Carlsen, writer and art director Hannah Debansi and writer Leah Sperring. The musical is rooted in Norwegian folklore and folk music, filled with puppetry and beautiful set design, ready to transport you into the fairy-tale forest.
description: Creatives:Composer and Lyricist - Hedda Rustad CarlsenCreator and art director - Hannah DebansiWriter and director - Leah SperringDramaturg - Helena Rustad CarlsenLight design - Bradley VarneyCostume design - Kate Debansi FarrerCast:Solveig - Hedda Rustad CarlsenOld Mother - Saskia DouglasKing Valemon/father of the house - Jack StringerNøkken - Em-J SmithEspen Askeladden - Samuel KoppelCountry Mouse - Helena Rustad CarlsenHouse Mouse - Leah SperringForest spirit - Kayleigh OsborneForest spirit - Hannah Debansi Company:One More Saga Productions(Website) Venues:The Dance Space - The Jamie Watton Creation Space The Dance Space - The Jamie Watton Creation Space
